prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年甘肃省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约202名、219名、271名、250名、265名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2021-2023年从202名逐步后移至271名，2024年小幅回升至250名，2025年又后移至265名。近5年累计后移约63名，2025年基准位次约265名；该校在甘肃省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021-2024年均为25人，2025年增至26人，2026年大幅扩招至43人，较2025年增加17人，增幅约65.4%。大幅扩招意味着竞争压力相对缓解，位次有后移倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第7位，属国内顶尖高校（C9联盟成员），学校层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世，曾为少年班点亮明灯）；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（教授因贪污助不合资格学生入读被判囚），但整体影响有限。抖音热度排名第12（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，中国科学技术大学拥有A+学科7个（物理学、化学、数学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A级学科3个（材料科学与工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），A-学科5个。数学A+、物理学A+、化学A+、计算机科学与技术A等优势学科与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，中科大在这些领域学科实力顶尖，报考热度不减。甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数218,700人，按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，物理类考生约147,600人，较2025年（121,443人）增长约21.5%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非甘肃省本地高校，无地域招生倾斜。该校在甘肃省招生占比极小，属跨省招生，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次265名、2026年大幅扩招65.4%（位次后移压力）、甘肃省物理类考生增长约21.5%（竞争加剧）、学校声誉与抖音热度高（报考热度不减）等多重因素，扩招效应大于考生增长效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移。预测最低位次约354名，区间312-396名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（数学类、数学类（华罗庚数学科技英才班）、大数据管理与应用、统计学）（数学及大数据技术）
- 工科试验班（计算机类、计算机类（华夏计算机科技英才班）、电子信息类、电子信息类（信息科技英才班）、人工智能、集成电路设计与集成系统、网络空间安全）（信息智能方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（机器人工程、理论与应用力学、机械设计制造及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、能源与动力工程、安全工程）（航空航天、人形机器人、低碳能源技术及安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（量子信息科学（未来技术学院）、物理学类、物理学类（严济慈物理科技英才班）、空间科学与技术（赵九章现代地球和空间科技英才班））（物理及应用物理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约354名，区间312-396名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（312名以内）可重点冲刺一档的数学及大数据技术、信息智能方向等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（396名附近）建议以三档物理方向为主，兼顾二档工科试验班。中科大各专业学科实力均属顶尖，无论录取到哪个专业均有优质培养资源。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) in Gansu Province were approximately 202, 219, 271, 250, and 265 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, rankings gradually moved back from 202 to 271, slightly recovered to 250 in 2024, and then moved back to 265 in 2025. Over the past 5 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 63 places, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at approximately 265. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province's science (physics category) was 25 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 26 in 2025, and significantly expanded to 43 in 2026, an increase of 17 students compared to 2025, a growth of about 65.4%. This substantial expansion means relatively eased competition pressure, with a tendency for rankings to move back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, belonging to the top domestic universities (C9 League member). The university's level is extremely high, maintaining strong attraction for high-scoring students. In the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive (the passing of Li Zhengdao, who once illuminated the path for the Special Class for the Gifted Young). In the 2026 cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (a professor was imprisoned for embezzlement to help unqualified students gain admission), but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 12th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. No obvious admission gaps or breaks were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, USTC has 7 A+ disciplines (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 3 A-level disciplines (Materials Science and Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and 5 A- disciplines. Advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, and Computer Science and Technology A are highly matched with the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. USTC has top-tier disciplinary strength in these fields, with undiminished application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is 218,700. Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 67.5%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is approximately 147,600, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025 (121,443), intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Gansu Province, so there is no regional enrollment preference. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is very small, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 265, the significant enrollment expansion of 65.4% in 2026 (pressure for ranking to move back), the approximately 21.5% increase in Gansu physics category candidates (intensified competition), and the high university reputation and Douyin popularity (undiminished application enthusiasm), the expansion effect outweighs the candidate growth effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 354, with a range of 312-396.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Mathematics (Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Talent Class), Big Data Management and Application, Statistics) (Mathematics and Big Data Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer Science, Computer Science (Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Talent Class), Electronic Information, Electronic Information (Information Science and Technology Talent Class), Artificial Intelligence, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Network Space Security) (Information Intelligence Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics Engineering, Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Energy and Power Engineering, Safety Engineering) (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology), Physics, Physics (Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Talent Class), Space Science and Technology (Zhao Jiuzhang Modern Earth and Space Science and Technology Talent Class)) (Physics and Applied Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 354, range 312-396. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 312), focus on sprinting for top-tier majors in Tier 1 such as Mathematics and Big Data Technology, Information Intelligence Direction, etc. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 396), it is recommended to mainly choose the Physics direction in Tier 3, while also considering the Engineering Experimental Class in Tier 2. All majors at USTC have top-tier disciplinary strength, and regardless of which major is admitted, students will have access to high-quality training resources.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
